title: Roundabout in My Head
overview: In the largest slaughterhouse in Algiers, men live and work in closed to the throbbing rhythms of their tasks and their dreams.  Hope, bitterness, love, paradise and hell, the football stories as of the Chaabi and Rai melodies that set their lives and their world.
